data: Added DeepL Translate and DeepLX Translate. (Implemented by @shadowxhero)
Added Alibaba Translate, NiuTrans, and Volcengine Translate. (Implemented by @shadowxhero)
Fixed occasional crashes reported by some users.
Fixed occasional unresponsiveness of the standalone search panel.
Added follow mode to light/dark mode.
Fixed PDF sniffing failure in MV3.
